name: geb
summary: GEB simulates the environment (e.g., hydrology, floods), the individual people, households and orginizations as well as their interactions at both small and large scale.
author: Jens de Bruijn, Maurice Kalthof, Veerle Bril, Lars Tierolf, Tarun Sadana, Tim Busker, Rafaella Oliveira
author_email: Jens de Bruijn <jens.de.bruijn@vu.nl>, Maurice Kalthof <w.m.l.kalthof@vu.nl>, Veerle Bril <v.c.bril@vu.nl>, Lars Tierolf <lars.tierolf@vu.nl>, Tarun Sadana <t.sadana@vu.nl>, Tim Busker <tim.busker@vu.nl>, Rafaella Oliveira <r.gouveialoureirooliveira@vu.nl>
